title: bridge-stm32wl: replace 4 expect() calls with error handling
description: firmware/bridge-stm32wl/src/main.rs has 4 expect() calls during LoRa init (lines 171, 189, 206, 245). These will panic the device if init fails. Replace with proper error handling - either return Result from init or enter a recoverable error state with LED indication.
notes: Development firmware uses panic_probe for debug info on panic. Init failures genuinely should stop the device. For production: add LED error patterns and optional watchdog recovery. Lower priority than library panics.
close_reason: Replaced panic/expect with error logging and graceful degradation (LED blink pattern or continue loop)
